description:
Create a new Third Party Risk entry in Eramba with the following details:

- Title: 'Cloud Provider Data Breach - TechCloud Solutions'
- Description: 'TechCloud Solutions disclosed a security breach on their multi-tenant cloud platform. Customer data, including encrypted database backups and application logs, may have been accessed by unauthorized parties. Our organization hosts PHI (Protected Health Information) on this platform, making this a potential HIPAA violation requiring immediate risk assessment and remediation planning.'
- Threats: 'Unauthorized access to cloud infrastructure, data exfiltration, compromised encryption keys'
- Vulnerabilities: 'Shared tenancy model, insufficient network segmentation by cloud provider, delayed breach notification'
- Risk Mitigation Strategy: Mitigate
- Review Date: 2025-07-15

metadata.expected_title: Cloud Provider Data Breach - TechCloud Solutions
